name: OpenClaw Gateway
short_desc: OpenClaw agent gateway — HTTP/WebSocket endpoint for channels and CLI coding agents.
author: OpenClaw
description: OpenClaw is a CLI coding-agent platform. This app runs its gateway (HTTP/WebSocket, 7 plugins: browser, canvas, device-pair, file-transfer, memory-core, phone-control, talk-voice) that clients and channels connect to. A shared gateway token is generated at install; clients must present it. Note: the gateway is an API/WebSocket endpoint, not a full browser dashboard. Config is not persisted in this build (starts with --allow-unconfigured).

form_fields.label: Gateway token (clients must present this to connect)
